welcomePhaseCaption: Choose your P31 welcome package — then Wye → Delta in five calm steps.

kid.label: Kid / teen
kid.cardSub: Bigger taps, fewer words, gentle pace. Grown-up can finish the lock later.
kid.topologyCaption: Your path: room to grow · still part of the mesh.
kid.voidLine1: Hey. This is a calm screen. Nothing jumps at you.
kid.voidLine2: Tap or press Enter when you’re ready for the next bit.
kid.phase2Prompt: Feel the slow pulse. Tap when it feels right — close is good enough.
kid.phase3Intro: Slide the four bubbles where you like. There’s no wrong shape.
kid.successLine: You did it. Opening your kid-friendly home base…
kid.successSub: Small steps · your own assistant · Wye → Delta done.

meshStart.headline: Your corner of the mesh
meshStart.sub: Short words, big actions. Your assistant remembers what you need — only for you.
meshStart.tetraBlurb: Tap a corner: build, connect, pace, or make stuff. All picked for you.
chips: What’s one tiny homework or chore I can do in 10 minutes?
I feel overwhelmed. Break my day into 2 steps.
Tell me a joke, then one calm tip.

adult.label: Adult · solo
adult.cardSub: Standard pace, full EDE, your private agent and tetra.
adult.voidLine1: Take a breath. This is a safe space.
adult.voidLine2: Tap or press Enter when you are ready.
adult.phase2Prompt: Feel the pulse. Tap in sync.
adult.pactTitle: One last step — secure the lock.
adult.successLine: Wye → Delta complete. Opening your workspace…
adult.successSub: Closed mesh loop · private edge · EDE assistant.

meshStart.headline: Your private assistant
meshStart.sub: Wye → Delta — you closed the star into a personal loop. Chat, energy, EDE — without mixing into the family cage unless you choose.
meshStart.tetraBlurb: Four docks on your agent — Structure, Connection, Rhythm, Creation.
chips: Help me break this task into 3 concrete coding steps.
I'm stuck on an error. Ask me for the stack trace, then suggest the smallest fix.
Draft a short conventional commit message for my current changes.
Given my low spoons today, what is the one smallest coding win in the next 25 minutes?

parent.label: Parent / caregiver
parent.cardSub: Larger targets, caregiver copy, mesh bridges for the whole household.
parent.topologyCaption: Your path: hold the mesh for others — and yourself.
parent.voidLine1: You carry a lot. This space is for you first.
parent.voidLine2: When you’re ready, we’ll set anchors for the household mesh.
parent.phase2Prompt: Find a rhythm that isn’t only crisis mode. Tap with the pulse.
parent.phase3Intro: Place Structure, Connection, Rhythm, Creation where your hands reach.
parent.pactTitle: Secure your lock — you can add others from settings.
parent.successLine: Caregiver path locked in. Opening your command surface…
parent.successSub: Private agent first · family bridges next · Delta closed.

meshStart.headline: Caregiver home base
meshStart.sub: Your assistant is private. Family mesh links stay explicit — no accidental spill.
meshStart.tetraBlurb: Structure for routines, Connection for people, Rhythm for spoons, Creation for advocacy & docs.
chips: I have 2 spoons left — what is the one thing to do before bed?
Draft a short school email from bullet points I’ll paste.
Help me split tomorrow between kids’ needs and my work.

neuro.label: Neuro-inclusive
neuro.cardSub: Low noise, clear steps, spoon-aware nudges. No shame, skip anytime.
neuro.topologyCaption: Your path: meet you where your nervous system is today.
neuro.voidLine1: No rush. No pop-ups. Just this screen and your pace.
neuro.voidLine2: When you’re ready, we go one step at a time.
neuro.phase2Prompt: Tap when the ring feels steady — or skip. Close counts.
neuro.phase3Intro: Drag only if it helps. Skip is always OK.
neuro.pactTitle: Lock only if it feels safe — otherwise skip and come back.
neuro.successLine: You chose your pace. Opening a calmer home base…
neuro.successSub: Same Delta loop · less chrome by default · your agent only.

meshStart.headline: Low-load home
meshStart.sub: Defaults lean calm. You can turn detail up anytime. Your thread stays in your object.
meshStart.tetraBlurb: Same four vertices — labels tuned for executive bandwidth.
chips: I’m frozen. Give me exactly one 5-minute action.
Sensory overload — what do I turn off first?
Rewrite this paragraph in fewer, plainer sentences.

builder.label: Builder / contributor
builder.cardSub: Registry, EDE, geodesic — ship cadence first.
builder.topologyCaption: Your path: tools out front, mesh as backbone.
builder.voidLine1: Welcome, builder. This mesh is for shipping.
builder.voidLine2: Tap when you’re ready to wire your corner.
builder.phase2Prompt: Sync to the pulse — then we open the toolbox.
builder.phase3Intro: Arrange your stack: structure, people, rhythm, ship.
builder.pactTitle: Lock your dev identity to this edge.
builder.successLine: Builder path armed. Opening EDE-forward home…
builder.successSub: Agents, workers, Pages — one Delta loop.

meshStart.headline: Builder desk
meshStart.sub: Personal agent + EDE + hub bridges. Keep cage data out until you bridge.
chips: Summarize this diff for a PR description.
What’s the smallest deploy I can do in 15 minutes?
Lint my plan: am I missing an edge case?

default.label: Surprise me / general
default.cardSub: Balanced defaults — you can tune later.
default.voidLine1: Take a breath. This is a safe space.
default.voidLine2: Tap or press Enter when you are ready.
default.phase2Prompt: Feel the pulse. Tap in sync.
default.pactTitle: One last step — secure the lock.
default.successLine: Wye → Delta complete. Opening your workspace…
default.successSub: Closed mesh loop · private edge · EDE assistant.
